title: EinsteinAISettings - Metadata API
description: Represents Einstein AI settings, including AI feedback integration with Data 360 and PII masking for AI trust features.

enableAIFeedbackWithDC.description: Indicates whether AI feedback integration with Data 360 is enabled (true) or not (false). Available in API version 60.0 and later.

enableTrustPIIMasking.description: Indicates whether PII (Personally Identifiable Information) masking for AI trust features is enabled (true) or not (false). Available in API version 60.0 and later.

wsdl_segment:
```xml
<xsd:complexType name="EinsteinAISettings">
  <xsd:complexContent>
    <xsd:extension base="tns:Metadata">
      <xsd:sequence>
        <xsd:element name="enableAIFeedbackWithDC" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:boolean"/>
        <xsd:element name="enableAITrustInputToxicityDetection" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:boolean"/>
        <xsd:element name="enableAITrustPromptInjectionDetection" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:boolean"/>
        <xsd:element name="enableAgentHealthMonitoringGA" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:boolean"/>
        <xsd:element name="enableTrustPIIMasking" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:boolean"/>
      </xsd:sequence>
    </xsd:extension>
  </xsd:complexContent>
</xsd:complexType>
```
